steps.title: Find the singular subject
steps.content: The subject of the main clause is The Amur River. The descriptive clause between commas does not change that singular subject.

steps.title: Use a singular verb
steps.content: Choice A, Choice C, and Choice D use plural verb forms, so they do not agree with the singular subject. The sentence needs the singular present-tense verb that matches The Amur River. The answer is B.
